protocol.prompt: Write four short bullet points about local MoE inference on a laptop.
protocol.windhover: default kestrel-engine (KPK mmap + CATS + int8 KV)
protocol.legacy: WH=0 dense.c path when pack still loads

runs.text:
- Install Python and necessary libraries
- Download and install MoE inference software
- Run inference on laptop
- Analyze results and make decisions<|im_end|>
